summary: Implemented a deterministic, read-only specbridge-standard-readiness command that aggregates offline doctor health, next-task selection posture, repository health, token/context governance, MCP resource posture, and standard execution boundaries before new governed task intake. The change adds a file-backed readiness artifact, artifact inventory family coverage, documentation, dashboards, contract/scope evidence, and CLI regression coverage.
policy_result: Within policy so far. The command is read-only unless OutputPath is explicitly provided, writes only .specbridge/standard-readiness/current.status.json, and records false boundaries for Claude launches, Codex launches, network calls, GitHub mutation, secret access, billing changes, CI/CD security changes, deployment, cleanup permission, and retention enforcement. Work stayed inside the issue-228 allowed scope.
risk_result: Medium risk and contained. The change touches CLI routing, tests, dashboard evidence, and status artifacts, but does not change live runtime behavior, GitHub mutation behavior, cleanup enforcement, retention enforcement, MCP server runtime, production configuration, billing, secrets, authentication, authorization, database, workflow, or deployment behavior.
unresolved_risks: GitHub Actions CI has not been collected until the PR is opened.
The command reports existing branch/artifact debt but intentionally does not authorize cleanup or retention enforcement.
merge_status: Not merged. Local implementation is complete and pending PR, CI, review gate, and post-merge closure.
